overview: Elysian Labs is a free professional creative platform with a Canva-like thumbnail and ad designer plus a CapCut-like video editor, wrapped in a premium dark-themed agency website with courses, portfolio, and contact pages.
features: Canva-like thumbnail & ad creator with drag-and-drop, templates, layers, and export
CapCut-like video editor with timeline, clips, text overlays, transitions, audio, and 720p export
Project dashboard to manage creative work
Free AI-taught courses on thumbnails, ads, and video editing
Premium dark-themed agency website with services, portfolio, about, and contact pages
